brand.title: Channel Vault
brand.subtitle: NAS observatory
auth.gate.title: Access token required.
auth.gate.subtitle: This instance has CVN_AUTH_TOKEN enabled. Enter the operator token once; it stays in this browser only.
auth.gate.required: The API rejected this browser because the access token is missing or invalid.
auth.gate.empty: Enter the operator token before unlocking.
sidebar.status.title: Sync engine warm
topbar.title: Watch channels become a private media memory.
dashboard.title: Today’s archive command deck.

release.readiness.title: The demo can breathe when these signals are green.
release.readiness.subtitle: Small, honest checks from the live app state before polishing docs or opening the repo.
release.readiness.source.title: Source
release.readiness.source.detail: At least one real channel anchors the vault.
release.readiness.security.title: Security
release.readiness.security.detail: The API is protected before the NAS is exposed beyond localhost.
release.readiness.sync.title: Sync
release.readiness.sync.detail: Metadata sync or scheduler has produced channel state.
release.readiness.queue.title: Queue
release.readiness.queue.detail: The guarded download queue can explain what will run.
release.readiness.library.title: Library
release.readiness.library.detail: Archived media is visible as indexed files and sidecars.
release.readiness.storage.title: Storage
release.readiness.storage.detail: NAS scan data is connected to pressure and drift panels.
release.readiness.backup.title: Backup/restore
release.readiness.backup.detail: metadata, archive sidecars, and runtime env are visible as recoverable durable roots.
release.readiness.audit.title: Audit
release.readiness.audit.detail: Events or scheduler ticks are persisted for operators.
release.brief.allGreenDetail: The live app signals are green; capture proof before the beta invite.
beta.proof.title: Export a public-safe proof of this install.
beta.proof.detail: Copies readiness, clean-install, runtime, mount, backup, queue, library, and audit evidence without titles, URLs, paths, tokens, or commands.
support.bundle.privacyDetail: Server export removes tokens, paths, source URLs, titles, and generated commands.
mountDoctor.title: NAS Mount Doctor
mountDoctor.detailHealthy: DB, metadata, archive, and runtime paths are separated and writable.
commandPalette.title: Go straight to the right operation.
commandPalette.subtitle: Search screens, channel tabs, logs, runtime, and storage without hunting through panels.

commandPalette.events.title: Operations event log
commandPalette.events.detail: Open persisted audit events, exports, retention, and incident details.
launch.runway.title: One path from source to archived media.
launch.runway.subtitle: Register, sync metadata, stage only missing videos, run a guarded pass, then verify the library.
launch.runway.source.title: Add source
launch.runway.source.detail: Channel URL, handle, or channel ID becomes the vault anchor.
launch.runway.sync.title: Check new videos
launch.runway.sync.detail: Metadata sync compares the source with the local archive index.
launch.runway.candidates.title: Stage missing only
launch.runway.candidates.detail: Already archived videos stay skipped before anything downloads.
launch.runway.download.title: Run guarded pass
launch.runway.download.detail: A confirmation modal keeps real downloads capped at five per pass.
launch.runway.library.title: Verify library
launch.runway.library.detail: Completed media is indexed with files, sidecars, and quality chips.
firstRun.empty.title: Start with one source, then let the NAS tell the story.

firstRun.empty.archiveDetail: Paste a youtube-dl ledger so already archived videos stay skipped.

firstRun.gate.subtitle: Start with {next}; every button opens the exact surface you need.

firstRun.gate.access.detail: Generate or paste CVN_AUTH_TOKEN before exposing a NAS console.

firstRun.gate.backup.detail: Copy backup and restore commands before trusting the archive.

firstRun.demo.blocked: Demo seed only runs in an empty workspace.

runtime.restart.ledgerError: Restart audit ledger failed to load

runtime.composeSmoke.title: Compose smoke verification

runtime.secure.subtitle: Generate and apply an operator token before this NAS leaves localhost.
runtime.token.title: Public access guard
runtime.token.subtitle: generate, copy, and verify an operator token before exposing this NAS
runtime.token.stateProtectedDetail: CVN_AUTH_TOKEN is configured, so the API rejects unauthenticated callers.
runtime.token.stateNeedsTokenDetail: Generate a token and apply it before publishing the console beyond localhost.
runtime.token.rotateNote: Rotating replaces the old token. Existing browser sessions must enter the new token after restart.
runtime.token.safetyManager: Save this token in your password manager now.
runtime.token.safetyRestart: After restart, this browser may ask for the token again.
runtime.token.safetyNoShare: Never paste this token into issues, screenshots, or support bundles.
runtime.token.hint: Generate a token to get a copyable CVN_AUTH_TOKEN env line and a 401/200 smoke test.
runtime.exposure.title: External exposure cookbook
runtime.exposure.subtitle: publish the web endpoint only; keep raw API loopback-bound
runtime.exposure.guardDetail: Use a trusted proxy, VPN, SSO, allowlist, or tunnel policy before sharing this NAS beyond localhost.
runtime.exposure.nginxDetail: server block with WebSocket upgrade headers for NAS reverse-proxy UIs.
runtime.exposure.caddyDetail: compact TLS reverse proxy for the Compose web service.
runtime.exposure.cloudflareDetail: no inbound NAS port; point the tunnel at the web service, not the raw API.
runtime.volume.title: Volume mount cookbook
runtime.volume.subtitle: separate SQLite metadata, runtime env, and large media before exposing the NAS
runtime.volume.runtimeDetail: Settings tab overrides and restart state
runtime.backup.title: Backup / restore confidence
runtime.backup.subtitle: prove the DB, archive sidecars, and runtime env can survive a NAS move
runtime.backup.readyDetail: Mount Doctor can inspect the durable roots. Keep an off-NAS copy of metadata and sidecars.
runtime.backup.warnDetail: One or more durable roots still need operator review before relying on restore.
runtime.backup.metadataDetail: SQLite app.db, migrations, startup DB backups
runtime.backup.archiveDetail: media files plus info JSON, subtitles, thumbnails, NFO
runtime.backup.quiescedDetail: briefly stop the stack, copy metadata/archive/runtime, then start again
runtime.backup.sqliteDetail: copy the operational index while the archive keeps running
runtime.backup.restoreDetail: restore durable roots, start the app, then rebuild from sidecars if DB was lost
runtime.apply.title: Runtime apply
runtime.apply.subtitle: save to managed env and activate after restart
runtime.apply.invalid: Check interval, limit, and binary values

runtime.ticks.subtitle: recent bounded worker passes persisted in SQLite
runtime.ticks.empty: No scheduler ticks have been recorded yet.

queue.console.blocked.detail: Candidates can still be created, but the worker will not claim jobs until runtime or policy unlocks it.

worker.history.empty: No worker runs match this view.

ops.title: Today’s archive missions
ops.subtitle: A live runbook from DB, queue, and NAS scan state.
ops.mission.register_first_channel.title: Register the first source
ops.mission.register_first_channel.detai: Start by adding a channel, playlist, or creator-owned export source.
ops.mission.enable_access_token.title: Protect external access
ops.mission.enable_access_token.detail: API binds to {primary} without {secondary}. Set an operator token before exposing it.
ops.mission.recover_storage_drift.title: Recover storage drift
ops.mission.recover_storage_drift.detail: {primary} unindexed media · {secondary} stale index rows need review.
ops.mission.quarantine_sidecars.title: Quarantine loose sidecars
ops.mission.quarantine_sidecars.detail: {count} orphan sidecars are outside media folders · {primary}.
ops.mission.capture_pressure_snapshot.de: Save the first pressure point so the NAS can estimate growth and runway.
ops.mission.refresh_pressure_snapshot.de: Latest pressure point is {primary} old; save a new one for runway accuracy.
ops.mission.review_channel_growth.title: Review rapid channel growth
ops.mission.review_channel_growth.detail: A channel NAS footprint grew by {primary} · {secondary}.
ops.mission.clear_failed_downloads.title: Clear failed downloads
ops.mission.clear_failed_downloads.detai: {count} failed jobs are waiting for retry or cleanup.
ops.mission.arm_worker.title: Worker is safely locked
ops.mission.arm_worker.detail: {count} prepared jobs exist, but live download claiming is disabled.
ops.mission.queue_missing_videos.title: Queue missing videos
ops.mission.queue_missing_videos.detail: {count} source videos are not archived yet · coverage {primary}.
ops.mission.resume_paused_channels.title: Review paused channels
ops.mission.resume_paused_channels.detai: {count} channel policies block worker claiming while still allowing candidates.
ops.mission.relieve_storage_pressure.det: Host volume pressure is {primary}; review largest channels and orphan files.
ops.mission.watch_storage_pressure.title: Watch storage pressure
ops.mission.watch_storage_pressure.detai: Host volume pressure is {primary}; keep an eye on growth.
ops.mission.enable_download_scheduler.de: Worker is enabled, but scheduled claiming is still manual.
ops.mission.enable_metadata_scheduler.de: Channels are registered; scheduled metadata checks can keep candidates fresh.
ops.mission.all_clear.title: Vault is in shape
ops.mission.all_clear.detail: No urgent drift, queue, or storage actions. Coverage is {primary}.
